subcodes.first_line: O ye who draw nigh unto the Threshold of God! Ye are mentioned in the Concourse on High, renowned in the Abhá Kingdom, and upon the tongues of the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقربان درگاه حق در ملا اعلی مذکورید و در ملکوت ابهی مشهور و در لسان اهل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
